name: pr-bot
description: SoulClone PR Bot — automated pull request creation, review, and merge
author: SoulClone

pr-creator.description: Creates structured PRs with conventional commits, auto-generates descriptions, assigns reviewers, and links to GitHub issues

pr-merger.description: Merges approved PRs with correct merge strategy, verifies checks, updates branches, runs post-merge hooks

pr-reviewer.description: Reviews PRs with multi-agent evaluation of code quality, security, performance, and style using confidence scoring
